name: Ownership Change
description: Transfer of pet ownership from one person to another
checks: Is a C3C form provided or referenced?
Are both previous and new owner details provided?

outcomes.transfer_complete: All required information provided for ownership transfer

response_templates.transfer_complete: Thank you for submitting the Change of Ownership (C3C) form for {animal_name} (microchip: {microchip_number}). The transfer will be processed within 10 business days.
response_templates.transfer_incomplete: Thank you for your ownership transfer request. To process, we require: {missing_items}.
